s61.title: 6.1 Role of the Token
s61.intro: The LTN token is a utility tool within the Liton Network ecosystem:
listItems: 🤝 Facilitation of interactions within the platform
s61.warning: Holding LTN confers no financial rights, no dividends, and no promise of returns.

s62.title: 6.2 Token Usage
s62.text: LTN is intended for strictly functional use. Its role is limited to the operational needs of the platform. The use of the token is independent of participation in the mining phase or premium services.
